step.title: Load story and parent epic
step.action: Read the story file and its parent epic document.

step.title: Check completeness
step.action: Verify the story has all required sections: persona, goal, benefit, acceptance criteria.

step.title: Check traces_to
step.action: Verify traces_to references a valid parent epic and the story aligns with epic goals.

step.title: Check acceptance criteria testability
step.action: Verify each acceptance criterion is specific, measurable, and testable.

step.title: Report PASS/FAIL
step.action: Produce a validation report. If all checks pass, route to sprint-plan. If any fail, route back to create-story with feedback.
